parity_explanation: Cached multi-dimensional policy tensors matched uncached row0 exactly for winner_policy_loss and loser_policy_loss. The remaining max diff came from the initial parity helper downcasting cached 0-dim reference-loss scalars to bf16 during device transfer. The Exp52 cache helper was fixed to keep scalar losses in float32 while still casting model tensors to bf16.
